ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula:
AND( NOT(ISNEW()), ISCHANGED(StageName),
NOT(ISPICKVAL(Type,"Feature Update")) , Probability >= 0.80, RecordTypeId <> '012b0000000cfCa', /*Panel Acquisition*/ $Profile.Id <> '00eb0000000oBvcAAE', $Profile.Name <> "SW SalesOps Extended", $Profile.Name <> "SW SalesOps", NOT(CONTAINS($Profile.Name, 'Integration')), RecordType.DeveloperName <> "Rank_Ranger", RecordType.DeveloperName <> "Acquired_Company", RecordType.DeveloperName <> "Partnership", MEDPIC_Next_Stage__c = false,
Decision_Maker__c =false)
ValidationRule.errorMessage: The field “Decision Maker Verbal Commitment” must be selected before you can close win the opportunity.
